pagination.empty: No rows match the current filters.

yearLabels.companyReportYearHint: From CompanyReport.reportYear — PDF document year on the processed shell.
yearLabels.dataYearHint: From ReportingPeriod.year — emissions/economy data year, not the PDF year.

apiAccess.title: API Access
apiAccess.subtitle: Configure API access role and generate an API key.
apiAccess.roleLoadError: Could not load API access role.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key
revokeDialog.description: Revoke "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone — the key will stop working immediately.

apiAccess.revealKeyDescription: This value is shown only when available. Store it securely.
apiAccess.revealKeyUnavailable: The full API key is not available for this entry.

createdDialog.title: Save your API key
createdDialog.warning: This key will only be shown once. Copy it now and store it somewhere secure — you won't be able to retrieve it again.

roles.partnerDescription: Read-only access: company listings, company details, and search
roles.firstPartyDescription: Full access to the client-facing HTTP API

editor.title: Editor
editor.subtitle: Edit company data in Garbo: Single Company for one business in detail, Bulk Edit mainly for tags across companies (reporting-year tables are secondary), and Manage Tag Options for allowed tags.

fieldEdit.sourcePlaceholder: e.g. report URL or Annual report 2024

metadataDetails.description: Source and validation metadata for this field.

reviewerDialog.title: Reviewer details
reviewerDialog.description: Add an optional reviewer comment and source reference for this save.

reportingPeriodQuickEdit.notFoundDescription: No reporting period found for this year.
reportingPeriodQuickEdit.description: Quick edit economy and emissions for this reporting year.

bulkUpdateTagsModal.title: Bulk Update Tags
bulkUpdateTagsModal.description: Apply the same tags to {{count}} companies. Each company will be updated with the selected tags (replacing their current tags).

singleCompanyView.searchPlaceholder: Search by company name or Wikidata ID...
singleCompanyView.searchByNameOrId: Search by Name or Wikidata ID
singleCompanyView.noCompaniesMatch: No companies match your search or filters.
singleCompanyView.tableStatsLine: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} companies · {{verifiedPeriods}} of {{periodTotal}} reporting periods have verified emissions data
singleCompanyView.tableStatsLineReports: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} report rows ({{companies}} companies) · {{verifiedPeriods}} of {{periodTotal}} data years have verified emissions
singleCompanyView.filterPeriodValidationSummary: In this filtered view: {{verified}} of {{total}} reporting periods have verified emissions data.
singleCompanyView.invalidBaseYear: Base year must be between 1990 and 2100.
singleCompanyView.economyDataHint: Per reporting period: edit turnover, currency, employees, and unit. Open the report link when a URL exists (edit dates and URL on the Reporting Periods tab). Mark verified when reviewed, then save. Filter by year or show all periods.
singleCompanyView.emissionsDataHint: Per reporting period column: edit stated totals and scopes 1–3 (including Scope 3 categories). Open the report link when a URL exists (edit dates and URL on the Reporting Periods tab). Use metadata, mark verified, undo edits, filter or sort years, scroll when needed, then save with optional reviewer comment and source.
singleCompanyView.reportingPeriodsDataHint: Set start and end dates and the report URL for each period. PDF catalog year and CompanyReport id show which processed report each period is linked to. Sort or filter years, reset unsaved changes, then save with optional reviewer comment and source.
singleCompanyView.companyReportsDataHint: Three year fields: Data year (ReportingPeriod.year), CompanyReport year (PDF on the shell), Report year (registry catalog when linked). Saving CompanyReport year also syncs Report.reportYear when linked.
singleCompanyView.multiplePeriodsSameDataYear: Multiple reporting periods share data year(s) {{years}} — each may be a different PDF (company report).
singleCompanyView.sameDataYearAsAnotherPeriod: Data for this year is present in other reports.
singleCompanyView.publicApiPeriodHint: This period is included in the public company API (newest report wins per data year).

addReportingPeriod.step1Description: Set the period boundaries and report link. Next you can enter economy and emissions for this period.
addReportingPeriod.validationDates: Enter both start and end dates.
addReportingPeriod.validationOrder: Start date must be on or before end date.
addReportingPeriod.validationYear: Could not determine reporting year from the dates.
addReportingPeriod.targetReportShellHint: Attach this period to an existing processed PDF report, or create a new company report shell for a new PDF.

deleteReportingPeriod.title: Delete Reporting Period
deleteReportingPeriod.description: This will permanently delete the reporting period for {{year}} from the database.

deleteCompany.sectionHint: Permanently delete this company and all associated data.
deleteCompany.title: Delete company
deleteCompany.description: This will permanently delete {{name}} ({{wikidataId}}) and all associated data from the database. This cannot be undone.

companyReports.empty: No company reports yet. Create shells via pipeline or link unlinked reporting periods to the registry.
companyReports.companyReportYearFieldHint: CompanyReport.reportYear. When linked, save also updates Report.reportYear.
companyReports.documentYearFieldHint: CompanyReport.reportYear. When linked, save also updates Report.reportYear.
companyReports.yearSaved: CompanyReport year updated (Report year synced when linked).
companyReports.invalidYear: Enter a four-digit year between 1990 and {{maxYear}}.
companyReports.registryYearMismatch: CompanyReport year ({{shellYear}}) differs from Report year ({{registryYear}}). Saving CompanyReport year updates both when linked.

linkModal.title: Link registry report
linkModal.description: Choose a Report registry row for this CompanyReport shell. Sets CompanyReport.registryReportId.
linkModal.descriptionUnlinked: Choose a registry Report for these unlinked periods. Creates a CompanyReport shell and sets companyReportId on each period.
linkModal.empty: No registry reports found for this company (wikidataId). Add the report in the registry tab first, or re-run pipeline after the registry-link fix is deployed.
linkModal.cannotUnlink: Registry link cannot be cleared. Select a different registry report to change the link.
linkModal.cannotUnlinkHint: To change the link, pick another registry report. Clearing the selection is not supported.
linkModal.noPeriods: No reporting period ids to link.

singleCompanyView.noGoalsOrInitiatives: No goals or initiatives for this company.

tagOptions.description: Tag options define the allowed values for company tags. Add, update, or remove options below.
tagOptions.empty: No tag options yet. Add one to get started.
tagOptions.label: Label
tagOptions.slugInvalid: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (e.g. large-cap).
tagOptions.dialogDescription: Slug is used in the database and API; label is optional and can be used for display.
tagOptions.slugFormatHint: Slug: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g. large-cap).
tagOptions.slugChangeHint: Changing the slug will update all companies that use this tag.
tagOptions.confirmDelete: Remove tag option "{{slug}}"? This will also remove the tag from all companies.

auth.loginRequiredMessage: You must log in to perform this action.
auth.loginRequiredTab: You must log in to use this tab.
auth.loginRequiredApp: You must log in to use this application.
auth.redirectToGitHub: You will be redirected to GitHub for authentication.
auth.loginAborted: Login aborted. You must grant access to continue.
auth.noAuthCode: No authentication code received. Try logging in again.
auth.authFailed: Could not authenticate. Check your internet connection and try again.
auth.pleaseWait: Please wait while we log you in.

upload.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 400 MB per file.
upload.dragDropPdf: Drag and drop PDF files or folders here
upload.selectAtLeastOneWorker: Select at least one job to run
upload.batchNameRequired: Enter a name for the new batch.
upload.forceReindexDescription: When on: run docling even if the report already exists in the vector DB (use after docling/OCR upgrade).
upload.storageDeduplicated: Reused {{count}} existing PDF(s) from storage (no duplicate upload).
upload.pdfCachedSummary: Cached {{total}} PDF(s) to storage ({{reused}} already in object storage).
upload.pdfCachePartialFailure: {{failed}} of {{total}} link(s) could not be cached. {{succeeded}} link(s) were still added.

jobstatus.title: Jobstatus
jobstatus.subtitle: Monitor or review data and/or report run details
jobstatus.runSpecificJobsHelper: Targets the latest run for currently filtered companies.
jobstatus.archiveIntro: Read-only history from Garbo (Postgres). Rerun and approvals still use the Live tab and the pipeline API while jobs exist in Redis.
jobstatus.archiveSearchPlaceholder: Company, Wikidata id, thread id, or URL…
jobstatus.archiveEmpty: No archived runs match your search.
jobstatus.archiveFailedHint: Failure reasons are stored in Postgres when the worker captured them.
jobstatus.archiveNoTerminalJobs: No completed or failed jobs were stored for this run yet.
jobstatus.archiveQueueHistoryIntro: {{count}} recorded finish(es) for this step (oldest first).
jobstatus.archiveMultiAttemptPillHint: Multiple finishes for this step — click to view all attempts.
jobstatus.noCompaniesMatch: No companies match the selected filters

jobdetails.redisRetentionLiveBody: This job is still active or waiting. Live Redis keeps about the {{count}} most recent runs per company; older completed runs move to Archive.
jobdetails.redisRetentionTerminalBody: Live Redis keeps about the {{count}} most recent runs per company. When a company exceeds that, older completed runs are removed from Redis — use the Archive tab for full history.
jobdetails.cannotRunNoExtractParent: Cannot run: no extractEmissions parent found for this run
jobdetails.cannotRerunMissingInfo: Could not rerun job: missing job information
jobdetails.approvalDescription: Please review the information and approve or reject.
jobdetails.rerunExplanation: This job has been run multiple times within the same report thread. The status shown reflects the latest attempt; the list below shows all attempts.
jobdetails.attemptsMixedOutcomesHint: Succeeded at least once (some attempts failed).
jobdetails.jobNotRunYet: This job has not been run yet.
jobdetails.noExtractEmissionsParent: Could not find an extractEmissions job in this run. The job cannot be triggered without a parent.
jobdetails.toastCannotApprove: Could not approve: missing job information
jobdetails.toastCannotRerun: Could not rerun job: missing job information
jobdetails.toastRerunWikidataSuccess: Job rerunning with new Wikidata ID
jobdetails.toastRerunCompanySuccess: Job rerunning with new company name
jobdetails.reportYearHintDescription: From URL at enqueue only — not used for save when extracted data years exist.
jobdetails.documentReportYearHint: Written to CompanyReport.reportYear and Report.reportYear when linked.

rerunByWorker.noCompanies: No companies found to rerun {{worker}} for

companyOverride.title: Change company name
companyOverride.description: If the company name found in the pre-check is not correct, you can enter a new name here. The job will be re-run with the new name.

errors.title: Error Browser
errors.subtitle: Compare emissions between stage and prod (all reporting periods per report)
errors.pairedViaReportIdentity: Paired with the other environment via shared report URL or PDF hash (no matching Wikidata ID)
errors.discrepancyGeneric: Right number placed in a safer/generic bucket (e.g. unknown, other)
errors.discrepancySwap: Values are swapped between two categories — both have each other's value
errors.discrepancyWrongCategory: Value placed in the wrong category (not a clean swap)
errors.discrepancyFalsePrecision: Value belongs in a generic bucket (unknown/other) but was placed in a specific category — false precision
errors.discrepancyDuplicate: Same value appears in multiple categories, inflating totals
errors.noDataTryFilters: No data to display. Try enabling more filters above.
errors.companiesInBothWithData: {{totalCompanies}} companies in both APIs, {{withAnyData}} with data

summary.title: Summary ({{year}})
summary.subtitle: High-level coverage and performance across all data points, using the current tag and year filters.

stageProdHelp.inBoth: Has a reporting period for {{year}} in both Stage and Prod
stageProdHelp.stageOnly: Has a reporting period for {{year}} in Stage only
stageProdHelp.prodOnly: Has a reporting period for {{year}} in Prod only
stageProdHelp.neither: Has no reporting period for {{year}} in either (may still exist as a company record)

summary.verifiedNote: Counts companies where every present emissions data point is marked verified in Prod metadata.
summary.dataPointTableSubtitle: Rates are computed from Stage vs Prod comparisons for the selected year (and tags).

errors.includeMissingCompanies: Include companies missing from one API ({{count}})
errors.filterPillTitle: Click to toggle, right-click to show only {{label}}
errors.filterAppliesToTableOnly: Note: These filters only affect the table below.

overview.dataPointsWithValues: {{withAnyData}} data points with values across {{categoryCount}} categories ({{totalCompanies}} total incl. both-empty)

errors.difficultReportTooltip: Difficult report — {{count}} errors across all data points
errors.unitErrorTooltip: Stage value is {{factor}} the prod value — likely a unit mismatch (e.g. tonnes vs kilotonnes)

crawler.title: Crawler
crawler.manualSearchGuard: Enter at least one company and a report year to search.
crawler.manualSearchDescription: This search will look for the latest report for each entered company from the entered year. The search is performed live and is not limited to existing database entries.
crawler.databaseSearchGuard: Select at least one company and a year from the existing database.
crawler.databaseControlsDescription: The search will return the reports for each selected company from the selected year that is in the database.
crawler.searchPlaceholder: Search for companies (one company per line)
crawler.loadingDescription: Hang in there as this may take a moment. The crawler is fetching and processing.
crawler.filterDescription: Only show companies without a report from the chosen year in the list
crawler.registryDuplicateFailure: A report for this company and year already exists in the registry.
crawler.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while adding to the registry.

overview.title: Status overview
overview.subtitle: High-level view across registry, queue archive, stage, and prod.
overview.subtitleCompanyYears: Company × report year grid (2020–present). Spot missing registry reports and data gaps per company.
overview.subtitleRegistryReports: One row per registry entry. Spot missing Wikidata IDs, unlinked CompanyReports, and pipeline status per saved report.
overview.subtitleCoverage: Track index constituent lists by year and see how many company names already exist in Garbo.
overview.subtitleProdToStage: Prod CompanyReports with at least one fully verified reporting period where the matching stage report has no emissions data yet. Run selected re-uploads the prod report URL through the stage pipeline only.
overview.searchPlaceholder: Search company, Wikidata ID, CompanyReport ID, or URL
overview.gapFiltersHintCompanyYears: Combine checkboxes to narrow down company × year rows that need a saved report, a Garbo CompanyReport, or a pipeline run.
overview.gapFiltersHintRegistryReports: Use these to find registry PDFs that have not been pipelined yet or are not linked to a CompanyReport in Garbo.

prodToStage.bannerTitle: Prod data in, stage pipeline out
prodToStage.bannerReadProd: Rows come from prod Garbo: linked CompanyReports with at least one fully verified reporting period, where stage does not already have emissions for that same prod report URL. Stage does not need the report in its registry yet.
prodToStage.bannerRunStage: Run selected queues jobs on the stage Pipeline API using the prod report URL (new upload to stage).
prodToStage.bannerNeverProd: This tab never runs the prod pipeline — only stage.
prodToStage.runPartial: {{failed}} of {{total}} report(s) failed to queue on stage. {{succeeded}} queued.
prodToStage.runError: Could not queue on stage pipeline: {{message}}
prodToStage.emptyDiagnosticsSkippedUnverified: {{count}} skipped (no fully verified reporting period on prod)
prodToStage.emptyDiagnosticsSkippedStage: {{count}} skipped (stage already has emissions for this prod report URL)
prodToStage.emptyDiagnosticsIncludedWithoutUrl: {{count}} included but missing a fetchable prod report URL

coverage.confirmDeleteList: Delete "{{name}}" and all its year editions? This cannot be undone.
coverage.confirmDeleteYear: Delete the {{year}} edition from "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
coverage.noYears: No year editions yet. Add a year to paste company names.
coverage.noEntries: No entries match the current filter.
coverage.formHint: Paste one company name per line. Coverage is computed live against Garbo company names.
coverage.editMatchDescription: Search Garbo companies and link this list entry to an existing company.
coverage.searchMinLength: Type at least 2 characters to search.

companyYears.company: Garbo company from stage or prod pipeline data. Click a row to open the editor.
companyYears.companyReportYear: Row bucket year — matches periods by CompanyReport.reportYear (or URL estimate), not ReportingPeriod.year.
companyYears.reportYear: Report year recorded on the registry entry (Report table).
companyYears.tags: Company tags from Garbo (union of stage and prod).
companyYears.report: Whether a registry entry exists for this company and report year, with a saved URL or S3 file.
companyYears.pipeline: Latest archived pipeline run for this company and report year (queue archive). Missing means no run was found.
companyYears.pipelineErrors: Job outcomes from that archived run. Green only when the run has jobs and all completed successfully. Missing when there is no run, the run is still in progress, or there are no jobs to assess.
companyYears.stageData: Whether stage Garbo has reporting periods for this PDF report year.
companyYears.prodData: Whether prod Garbo has reporting periods for this PDF report year.
companyYears.prodVerified: Whether prod emissions for this report year are fully verified (every populated emissions field has verifiedBy metadata).

registryReports.company: Company name from the registry entry.
registryReports.reportYear: Report year from the registry (Report table).
registryReports.reportUrl: Link to the report PDF or source page (url, then sourceUrl, then s3Url).
registryReports.registryReportId: Primary key of the Report row in the registry — every row in this view must have one.
registryReports.companyReportId: Linked Garbo CompanyReport ID when a stage or prod reporting period matches this registry report.
registryReports.wikidata: Whether the registry entry has a Wikidata ID for matching to Garbo companies.
registryReports.registryFile: Whether the registry entry has a source URL and/or cached S3 file.
registryReports.companyReport: Whether this registry PDF is linked to a Garbo CompanyReport shell.
registryReports.pipeline: Latest archived pipeline run matched to this registry URL or company and report year.
registryReports.pipelineErrors: Job outcomes from that archived run. Green only when the run has jobs and all completed successfully.

pagination.empty: No rows match the current filters.

registry.title: Registry
registry.subtitle: Search and inspect registry entries before wiring full workflows.
registry.searchPlaceholder: Search company name, Wikidata ID, or URL — paste one company per line from Excel
registry.runReportsDescription: Run selected reports with upload options ({{count}} selected).
registry.runReportsPartial: {{failed}} of {{total}} report(s) failed to queue. {{succeeded}} report(s) were queued.
registry.noReportUrls: No valid report URLs found in selection.
registry.noResults: No registry entries matched your search.
registry.s3KeyHint: The path to this file inside the bucket — not an AWS login or access key.
registry.s3BucketHint: The bucket name in object storage (e.g. S3, R2) — not a password or secret.
registry.editDropPdf: Drop a PDF to upload and fill storage fields
registry.editDropPdfHint: If Report URL is empty, it will be set to the uploaded file URL
registry.editPdfMultipleIgnored: Only one PDF at a time — {{count}} extra file(s) ignored
registry.invalidYear: Year must be a 4-digit number between 1900 and 2100
registry.invalidUrl: Must be a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)
registry.invalidSha256: Must be 64 hexadecimal characters or empty to clear
registry.filterTagsMultiHint: Open the menu to add or remove tags (any match).
registry.filterTagsCompanyListError: Could not load company list — tag filters are disabled.
registry.sortIdHint: Row order uses the internal id as a stand-in until a created-at field exists on reports.
registry.addEntryDescriptionSingle: Add one report with company name, year, and URL. All marked fields are required.
registry.addEntryDescriptionMultiFiles: Add many reports at once by dropping PDF files or folders. Company and year can be filled in later.
registry.addEntryDescriptionMultiUrls: Paste one PDF link per line. Entries are added with company name "Unknown" until you edit them.
registry.addEntryDescription: Register a report by URL or by dropping PDF files (including folders). Source URL is pre-filled from the report URL when adding by link.
registry.addEntryDescriptionFiles: Drop PDF files or folders, then add. Company and year can be filled in later by editing the entry.
registry.fileTooLarge: {{count}} file(s) exceeded the {{maxMb}} MB limit and were skipped.
registry.dragDropPdf: Drag and drop PDF files or folders here
registry.dragDropPdfHint: Or click to select PDF files
registry.droppedFilesHint: Each PDF will be uploaded and registered with the company details below.
registry.reportUrlFromFiles: Report URLs will be created from the uploaded PDF files.

climate.noneFound: No climate plans found. Add municipality data to public/climate-plans/.

detail.noDataAvailable: No plan scope or emission targets data available for this municipality.

scope.referenceValuesFromApi: Reference values ({{year}}) from API in prod

wikidata.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Wikidata ID should be Q followed by digits (e.g. Q123456)
wikidata.overwriteDescription: If the suggested Wikidata ID is not correct, you can enter another ID here. The job will be re-run with the new ID.
wikidata.mustStartWithQ: Wikidata ID must start with Q
wikidata.approveDescription: Approve the suggested Wikidata ID. The job will be re-run with approval.
wikidata.name: Name
